function.message: Processed the next inbox item by OCR-structuring all bills related to Ida Novak. Added schema-compliant YAML frontmatter to three purchase records while preserving their original note bodies, then deleted the handled inbox file.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed required bootstrap (tree/read AGENTS/context), read nested AGENTS for entered folders, used process-next-inbox-item + OCR + migration workflows, used finance schema for exact bill frontmatter shape, and deleted inbox item after successful structured-record maintenance.
function.outcome_justification: Inbox request was to OCR all bills related to Ida Novak. Canonical identity was verified in 10_entities/cast/ida.md. Three related bills were identified in 50_finance/purchases via explicit related_entity mentions and each file was read, then updated with required bill frontmatter fields and line items extracted from visible note content per finance-record-frontmatter.md. After completion, the processed inbox file was deleted per process-next-inbox-item.md and inbox-processing-v2-update.md.
